managed_by: Andy — edit this file to add/remove
how_to_match: Case-insensitive substring match against the prospect's company name. E.g., 'Desjardins Group' matches 'Desjardins'. Normalize whitespace and punctuation before matching.
usage_rule: If the prospect's company matches any entry in approved_vendor_companies, include one approved-vendor mention in Email 1 AND one more in Email 3 or Email 4 (Claude picks whichever fits the narrative best). Do NOT mention in every email.
